<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.8 -->

# src/generation/writers

Serializes generated documentation artifacts (.sum, .annex.sum, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md) with YAML frontmatter, content hashing, user-authored file preservation, and evaluation variant routing.

## Contents

**[sum.ts](./sum.ts)** — `SumFileContent` type, `writeSumFile()` / `readSumFile()` for .sum serialization with YAML frontmatter (`purpose`, `critical_todos`, `related_files`, `contentHash`, `generatedAt`), `writeAnnexFile()` wraps source in markdown fence for reproduction-critical constants, `getSumPath()` / `getAnnexPath()` resolve variant-aware paths (`.${variant}.sum`), `parseSumFile()` extracts frontmatter via `/^---\n([\s\S]*?)\n---\n/`, `parseYamlArray()` handles inline `[a, b]` and multi-line `- item` formats.

**[agents-md.ts](./agents-md.ts)** — `writeAgentsMd()` writes AGENTS.md with `GENERATED_MARKER` comment, detects user-authored files via `isGeneratedAgentsMd()` checking `GENERATED_MARKER_PREFIX`, renames to AGENTS.local.md and prepends `@AGENTS.local.md` import, variant mode writes `AGENTS.${variant}.md`, `writeAgentsMdHub()` creates hub file with `@AGENTS.${activeVariant}.md` import, strips marker prefix from LLM content before writing.

**[claude-md.ts](./claude-md.ts)** — `writeClaudeMdPointer()` generates CLAUDE.md importing AGENTS.md via `@AGENTS.md` reference, preserves existing user CLAUDE.md as CLAUDE.local.md with `@CLAUDE.local.md` import, uses `GENERATED_MARKER_PREFIX` from `./agents-md.js` for detection.

**[index.ts](./index.ts)** — Barrel export of `writeSumFile`, `readSumFile`, `getSumPath`, `sumFileExists`, `getAnnexPath`, `writeAnnexFile`, `SumFileContent` from `./sum.js`, `writeAgentsMd`, `writeAgentsMdHub` from `./agents-md.js`, `writeClaudeMdPointer` from `./claude-md.js`.

## User Content Preservation

User-authored AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md detected by absence of `GENERATED_MARKER_PREFIX` (`<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer`), renamed to .local.md on first generation, preserved via `@{filename}.local.md` import directive in generated file header, ensuring AI agents see user content before generated content.

## File Structure

**.sum files:** YAML frontmatter between `---` delimiters (`generated_at`, `content_hash`, `purpose`, optional `critical_todos` / `related_files` arrays), followed by summary text; arrays use inline `[a, b, c]` if ≤3 items <40 chars, else multi-line `  - item` format.

**.annex.sum files:** Markdown header, `GENERATED_MARKER` comment, code fence wrapping verbatim source content for files whose constants exceed .sum size limits (referenced from .sum as `[filename.annex.sum](./path/filename.annex.sum)`).

**AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md:** Marker comment, blank line, optional `@{filename}.local.md` import (user content), optional `@AGENTS.${variant}.md` import (eval variant), LLM-generated content.

## Variant Routing

`variant` parameter controls eval mode: `writeSumFile(path, content, "claude.haiku")` writes `.claude.haiku.sum`, `writeAgentsMd(dir, root, content, "gemini.flash")` writes `AGENTS.gemini.flash.md`, `writeAgentsMdHub(dir, "claude.haiku")` writes hub AGENTS.md importing `@AGENTS.claude.haiku.md`; variant files bypass user-preservation logic, hub files apply preservation.

## Behavioral Contracts

**YAML frontmatter regex:**
- Delimiter: `/^---\n([\s\S]*?)\n---\n/`
- Field extraction: `/generated_at:\s*(.+)/`, `/content_hash:\s*(.+)/`, `/purpose:\s*(.+)/`
- Array inline: `/key:\s*\[([^\]]*)\]/`
- Array multi-line: `/key:\s*\n((?:\s+-\s+.+\n?)+)/m`

**Generation marker:** `GENERATED_MARKER_PREFIX = '<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer'` (version-agnostic), `GENERATED_MARKER` appends version from `getVersion()`.

**Array formatting:** Inline if ≤3 items with max length <40, else multi-line with `  - ` prefix.
